title: Barbeque Nation is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Barbeque Nation is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation:
Barbeque Nation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation!
